title: Threat mitigation system and method
abstract: A computer-implemented method, computer program product and computing system for: establishing connectivity with a plurality of security-relevant subsystems within a computing platform; and mapping one or more data fields of a unified platform to one or more data fields of each of the plurality of security-relevant subsystems.
claims: 1. A computer-implemented method, executed on a computing device, comprising: establishing connectivity with a plurality of security-relevant subsystems within a computing platform; defining a unified query on a unified platform concerning the plurality of security-relevant subsystems; and denormalizing the unified query to define a subsystem-specific query for each of the plurality of security-relevant subsystems, thus defining a plurality of subsystem-specific queries.
